segments.speaker: 题目15/16
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm looking for a good restaurant to celebrate finishing my thesis. Do you have any recommendations? How about that new French restaurant downtown? I went last week and I had a chicken dish that was delicious. That sounds perfect. My advisor loves French food. I'll check if they have any availability for Friday night. You might want to call them soon. I think they fill up fast.
